violations.text: (Various food product) was observed held at (49) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout back kitchen area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

(Prep unit) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 49DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS products in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The (ceilings ) throughout the establishment is in poor repair. Observed damaged, missind, and/or water stains The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
The ceiling in the (food prep/kitchen ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
